summary: Iteration 16: P3 (Scheduler), P4 (Stock Reports), and bcrypt warning fix tested. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All P3 and P4 UI features fully functional. bcrypt warning fix verified.

issues: Console warning about <span> inside <tbody> - same HTML structure warning as previous iterations, cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality
Some items show 'Unknown' as name - this is a data issue where item IDs in stock_usage don't have matching items in items collection (likely deleted items or test data)

passed_tests: Backend P3: GET /api/scheduler/config - Returns 3 default jobs (daily_sales, low_stock, expense_summary)
Backend P3: GET /api/scheduler/config - Each job has job_type, enabled, hour, minute, channels, label fields
Backend P3: PUT /api/scheduler/config/daily_sales - Updates enabled flag successfully
Backend P3: PUT /api/scheduler/config/daily_sales - Updates hour/minute time
Backend P3: PUT /api/scheduler/config/daily_sales - Updates channels (whatsapp, email)
Backend P3: POST /api/scheduler/trigger/daily_sales - Triggers manual execution (200 OK)
Backend P3: POST /api/scheduler/trigger/low_stock - Triggers manual execution (200 OK)
Backend P3: POST /api/scheduler/trigger/expense_summary - Triggers manual execution (200 OK)
Backend P3: GET /api/scheduler/logs - Returns execution logs with job_type, triggered_at, status
Backend P4: GET /api/stock/report/consumption - Returns items, daily_trend, period_days, total_consumption_cost
Backend P4: GET /api/stock/report/consumption?days=7 - Supports days parameter
Backend P4: GET /api/stock/report/consumption?branch_id=X - Supports branch_id filter
Backend P4: GET /api/stock/report/profitability - Returns items with margin, profit analysis
Backend P4: GET /api/stock/report/profitability?branch_id=X - Supports branch_id filter
Backend P4: GET /api/stock/report/wastage - Returns wastage data with items, total_waste_cost
Backend P4: GET /api/stock/report/wastage?days=14 - Supports days parameter
Backend Regression: Dashboard stats, Sales, Employees, Stock Balance, Settings endpoints all working
UI P3: Settings page has Scheduler tab visible
UI P3: Scheduler tab shows 3 job cards (Daily Sales Summary, Low Stock Alert, Expense Summary)
UI P3: Each job card has enable checkbox, time picker, WA/Email channel buttons, Test button
UI P3: Clicking Test button triggers job and shows success toast
UI P3: Recent Scheduler Logs section shows execution history with 'completed' status badges
UI P4: Stock page has Reports tab visible
UI P4: Reports tab shows 4 summary cards (Total Consumption Cost, Potential Revenue, Gross Profit, Wastage Loss)
UI P4: Daily Consumption Trend bar chart renders with date axis
UI P4: Consumption Analysis table shows items with Total Used, Daily Avg, Active Days, Cost/Unit columns
bcrypt fix: Backend logs no longer show 'bcrypt.__about__' warning after login/auth operations
critical_code_review_comments: P3 Implementation correct: APScheduler-based scheduler with AsyncIOScheduler, 3 configurable jobs stored in MongoDB scheduler_config
P3 Trigger endpoint works: POST /api/scheduler/trigger/{job_type} executes report generation (WhatsApp send silently fails if not configured - expected)
P3 UI complete: SettingsPage has Scheduler tab with job cards, time pickers, channel toggles, test buttons, logs display
P4 Implementation correct: New endpoints /api/stock/report/consumption, /profitability, /wastage with proper data aggregation
P4 UI complete: StockPage has Reports tab with summary cards, Daily Consumption Trend chart (Recharts), and data tables
bcrypt fix verified: logging.getLogger('passlib.handlers.bcrypt').setLevel(logging.ERROR) suppresses passlib logger warning

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All P3 and P4 UI features verified working)

seed_data_creation: Triggered scheduler jobs during testing, created execution logs visible in Scheduler Logs section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 complete. P3 (Scheduler) fully implemented - APScheduler with 3 jobs (daily_sales, low_stock, expense_summary), config stored in MongoDB scheduler_config collection, UI in Settings > Scheduler tab with enable/disable, time picker, channel selection (WA/Email), and Test buttons. P4 (Stock Reports) fully implemented - 3 new endpoints (/consumption, /profitability, /wastage) with branch_id and days filters, UI in Stock > Reports tab with summary cards, daily trend chart, and data tables. bcrypt warning fixed by setting passlib logger to ERROR level. WhatsApp trigger works (actually sends messages if Twilio configured). Note: Some items in consumption table show 'Unknown' - this is existing data issue with orphaned item_ids in stock_usage collection.
rca_of_the_issue: bcrypt warning was caused by passlib trying to read bcrypt.__about__.__version__ which doesn't exist in bcrypt 4.x. The warnings.filterwarnings approach didn't work because passlib uses Python's logging module, not warnings module. Fix: logging.getLogger('passlib.handlers.bcrypt').setLevel(logging.ERROR)
